text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae apologizes to me for the harsh
things she said to Copano Rickey during the
Champions Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The clash has made Copano Rickey question
whether feng shui can actually make everyone
happier.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Realizing what's going on, Smart Falcon writes
and performs a special song of encouragement to
help Rickey regain her courage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The song has its intended effect, and Copano
Rickey finds the strength to stand tall and
reconnect with her original purpose.
